features: CLEANS & SHINES: Swirl jewellery cleaner removes tarnish and dullness from silver, gold, platinum, diamonds and gemstones

FAST & EFFECTIVE: Works in as little as 5–10 minutes, making it ideal for quick refreshes or deep cleans. Simply place jewellery in the basket, wait, and enjoy a dazzling result. Perfect before special occasions.
SUITABLE FOR MULTIPLE METALS: Designed for use as a silver cleaner for jewellery, but equally effective on gold, platinum and mixed-metal pieces. Keeps every item in a collection looking pristine.
GENTLE FORMULA: Safe for precious stones, including diamonds and gemstones, while delivering a thorough clean. Maintains the natural beauty of each piece without causing damage or scratches.
INCLUDES BASKET & BRUSH: The built-in basket allows for easy dipping and removal, while the brush helps to reach intricate settings and detailed designs for a complete clean.
description: Product Description Bring dull jewellery back to life with Swirl Liquid Jewellery Cleaner, the easy and effective way to keep treasured pieces looking their best. This silver cleaner for jewellery is specially formulated to clean and shine silver, gold, platinum, diamonds and gemstones, removing tarnish, dirt and dullness. Ingredients Contains: SODIUM ALPHA OLEFIN SULPHONATE, C12-15 PARETH-7 Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Anionic Surfactants, EDTA, DMDM Hydantoin Directions * Place jewellery to be cleaned in the basket * Leave for 5-10 minutes * Lift basket, remove the jewellery and use the brush if needed to clean further * Rinse under clean water, wipe clean and dry thoroughly * If required, repeat the process above * If only light cleaning is required, dip a clean cloth in the liquid and apply to the jewellery. Leave to stand for a couple of minutes. Rinse in clean water, wipe clean and dry thoroughly IMPORTANT: For use on fine jewellery only. Do not use on stainless steel. If unsure of jewellery composition test on an inconspicuous area before use. See more
